artifact_role: Coverage ledger for the construction-space exploration program. Cells are construction families on the six-axis template; rung grades are per sector track. This file changes no claim status or verdict.

rung_semantics.R0: consistency: not falsified by the track's frozen sharp constraint list; imports permitted but typed
rung_semantics.R1: hosting: accommodates the track's structures with typed AND counted imports (import_count reported)
rung_semantics.R2: native selection: structure forced by the construction without sector-specific repair (North Star bar; grades survivors only)
rung_semantics.R0_FAIL: falsified against the sharp constraint list at consistency strength; boundary data carving the map
rung_semantics.OPEN: not yet examined at this rung; prior derivation-strength kills do NOT settle R0/R1
rung_semantics.GATED: examination blocked on a named dependency

retro_grading_note: Initial grades are retro-read from existing evidence at register/canon pointers. Every retro grade carries verification_needed: true until an hourly probe confirms it against the frozen constraint list. Prior BOUNDED_NO_GO results were derivation-strength (R2) kills; they are recorded as boundary data and do not settle R0/R1.

preregistered_endings.summary: Empty joint R0 intersection means the predeclared construction class failed the frozen sharp lists, not a global GU verdict. A survivor means existence at the recorded minimum rung with typed imports; only R2 supports native unification.

SM: gauge anomaly cancellation for the surviving spectrum
chirality production (left-right asymmetric fermion content realizable)
three generations without per-generation adjustable structure
absolute hypercharge normalization consistent with electric charges
physical Higgs sector with electroweak breaking
complete surviving spectrum matches observed content
extra/mirror mode decoupling at accessible energies
QM: physical state space via a well-defined quotient
observables as operators on that space
locality/causal structure compatible with the pairing and causal-order axes
no negative-norm physical states after constraint discharge
GR: a vacuum sector in which the Q^TF(B) obstruction is cancelled or structurally evaded (vacuum-supported source, or different residual bookkeeping)
preservation of the linear cheap-read clears (Schwarzschild and Kerr linear-in-M residuals remain zero)
no target-shaped stress import (standard Einstein dynamics stays comparator-only)
COSMO: a physical scalar channel with a gauge-invariant projector
an observable map to expansion/perturbation quantities
a closed SVT quadratic truncation with dischargeable non-scalar residues

cells.family: Frozen W229 record-sourced induced-YM nonlocal branch (the tested construction)
cells.axis_notes: Fully specified per the recovery manifest; the only cell with a complete Layer0+L1-L7 signature.

SM.note: R2 BOUNDED_NO_GO (no native selector); hosting evidence (Pati-Salam/Spin(10) + relative arithmetic) is real.

QM.note: Certificates absent natively; the adapter axiom is exactly a typed import awaiting the p2c return.

GR.note: Vacuum source vanishes (Psi=0 -> J=0 -> theta=0); zero tensor cannot cancel nonzero Q^TF(B). Fails the sharp list at consistency strength. Binding constraint of this family.

COSMO.note: No physical scalar projector/observable map/closed truncation found in-branch; retro-read as R0 fail pending one confirmation pass at consistency strength.

cells.family: W203 ultralocal limit of the record-current branch
cells.axis_notes: Shares C1 signature except locality of the source law (L4/L6 delta).

SM.note: Presumed to inherit C1 hosting; not independently examined.

GR.evidence: register: same zero-source obstruction unless a different non-record source is supplied

cells.family: Fundamental-stiffness / bare-theta branch (theta as fundamental field, not record-sourced)
cells.axis_notes: L1/L6 delta from C1: source ontology changes; axis template partially UNDERDEFINED.

GR.note: P1 lemma: the current scalar/isotropic bare-theta or fundamental-stiffness seed is in the wrong tensor slot for the trace-free Q^TF(B) residual. A future source-owned bare-theta equation with boundary data, normalization, and trace-free tensor shape remains a new dependency, not current evidence.

COSMO.note: A fundamental theta is also a natural scalar-channel candidate for the COSMO track.

cells.family: Boundary-conditioned adapter constructions (explicit typed adapter assumption)
cells.axis_notes: L2/L7 delta: observer/positivity structure supplied at the boundary.

QM.gate: frozen p2c packet; PHYSICAL-C-CONDITIONAL (READY) is this cell's live probe

cells.family: GU-native gauge quotient + observer-section selector routes (target-free A_F / G_SM-Z6 candidates)
cells.axis_notes: L2/L3 delta from C1: selector built from observer-section data.

SM.note: P2 harness: the current Pati-Salam/Spin(10) host seed has real relative anomaly and hypercharge arithmetic, but fails SM R0 because no source-owned target-free selector, native three-generation mechanism, physical Higgs sector, complete spectrum theorem, or extra-mode decoupling is present. The harness remains reusable for future source-owned selector packets.

GR.note: Presumed to inherit C1's source law unless combined with C3/C9; combination cells created on demand.

cells.axis_notes: L5 delta: breaking/chirality as emergent from source dynamics; largely UNDERDEFINED.

SM.note: Swing-2 killed at derivation strength; R0 question (is source-owned breaking consistent with the sharp list at all?) unexamined.

cells.family: Gauge-invariant / constrained composite scalar from frozen GU fields
cells.axis_notes: L3/L5 delta: scalar as composite of existing sectors.

COSMO.note: Primary track: does any composite admit a projector + observable map + closed truncation at consistency strength?

cells.family: Scalar induced by mixing among already-present GU sectors
Ambient-curvature / H-class balance mechanisms for the Willmore residual
cells.axis_notes: L1/L7 delta: residual bookkeeping uses ambient or H-class structure.

GR.gate: source-owned higher-codimension first variation plus coefficient frozen before Schwarzschild/Kerr target use
GR.note: P1 C9-first result: ambient/H-class is the correct type of residual-bookkeeping fork and preserves the linear cheap-read clears, but current evidence does not yet freeze the first variation or coefficient. Gated, not failed.

coverage.summary: 12 of 36 track-cells are now non-open: 7 carry R0/R1 grades and 5 are gated. P1 moved C3-GR to R0_FAIL and C9-GR to GATED; P2 moved the current C5-SM seed to R0_FAIL. No exhaustion claim: C4 and C9 remain gated and future source-owned selector packets can run through the P2 harness.

council_rounds.mode: inline persona pass (members -> rank -> chairman), Joe-directed session

member_positions.geometer: C9 first: the ambient/H-class balance is a well-posed geometric question and the only structural (non-field-content) escape from Q^TF(B).
member_positions.category_theorist: Type the adapter interface of C4 now so the p2c return lands typed; cheap and removes later rework.
member_positions.statistician: Maximize kill-rate per hour: the SM arithmetic sweep on C5 evaluates many candidates per run; also instrument kill-rates to validate constraint sharpness per the expressiveness guard.
member_positions.computer_scientist: C5 sweep is the only currently scriptable enumeration; automate it before hand-probing single cells.
member_positions.ml_researcher: Treat the map as active learning: probe where posterior uncertainty about joint feasibility is highest, which is R0-GR on C3/C9 since GR is the binding constraint.
member_positions.condensed_matter_physicist: C3 bare-theta resembles a stiffness/order-parameter background; the R0 check (vacuum support with imported stiffness) is a short calculation.
member_positions.numerical_engineer: C3 R0 and the C5 sweep both reduce to bounded computations runnable in tests/; prefer probes with machine-checkable outputs.
member_positions.logician: Freeze constraint-list semantics before any pass so R0_FAIL is well-defined; confirm C1-COSMO retro-fail against the list rather than inheriting the R2 language.
member_positions.optimization_theorist: The joint intersection is empty iff the GR track is empty (its live set is smallest: C3, C9, gated C4). Resolve the smallest feasible set first; everything else is secondary.
member_positions.historian: GUT-era model space died by arithmetic (anomalies, proton decay), which argues the SM sweep will genuinely kill cells; but binding-constraint logic still favors GR-first.

ranked_search_plan.what: Examine C3 (bare-theta vacuum support with imported stiffness) and C9 (ambient/H-class balance) against the GR sharp list at consistency strength; machine-checkable residual computations where possible.
ranked_search_plan.why: GR is the binding constraint and its live set is smallest; an empty GR track empties the joint intersection (optimization/ML/geometer/condensed-matter consensus).

ranked_search_plan.what: Script the R0 arithmetic sweep over candidate finite algebras/quotients from the Spin(10)/Pati-Salam host: anomaly cancellation, chirality, three generations, hypercharge normalization; emit per-candidate pass/fail into tests/.
ranked_search_plan.why: Highest kill-rate per hour; scriptable; also calibrates SM constraint sharpness (statistician/CS/historian).

ranked_search_plan.what: Confirm the retro grades (C1-SM R1 import count, C1-COSMO R0 status, C2-GR inheritance) against the frozen lists; clear verification_needed flags.
ranked_search_plan.why: Cheap integrity: keeps the map honest before it accumulates weight (logician).

ranked_search_plan.what: Convert the QM CONDITIONAL_FAIL certificate list into the per-cell R0 checklist and type C4's adapter interface for the p2c return.
ranked_search_plan.why: Documentation-grade cost, removes rework when the packet lands (category theorist).

council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: Run P1 and P2 as the opening probes in that order; fold P3 into whichever runs first as its closing step; P4 rides along at documentation cost. Re-convene after P1 or P2 completes, or immediately if the GR track's live set changes size in either direction.

council_rounds.mode: inline persona pass, Joe-directed ad-hoc bench

member_positions.orthodox_professor: The bounded no-gos are the most durable assets. State P1 as a lemma with hypotheses and machine-checked arithmetic ('no bare-theta background in class X cancels Q^TF(B) at O(M^2)'); predeclare the P1 endpoint. R0-with-imports risks repeating GUT-era drift without lemma discipline.
member_positions.heterodox_professor: Young theories fail their strictest test first; the rung reframe is the correction. C9 before C3: bookkeeping change over field addition is closer to GU's geometric spirit. Deeper: re-derive what vacuum means natively (is Psi=0 native or comparator-inherited?) before treating vacuum-support failure as family-wide — a legitimate reframe candidate. Count imports without letting the counter become an orthodoxy stick.
member_positions.commercial_scientist: The map + ladder is the reusable asset. Build P2 as a harness (candidate in, constraint-arithmetic verdict out), not a one-off script; run concurrent with P1 since its kill-rate compounds. 'Surviving set after N sweeps' is a communicable deliverable regardless of outcome.
member_positions.wild_frontier_scientist: Nine cells is a shortlist of the committee's imagination. Generalize P2 into a construction compiler + constraint checker and generate candidates over the axis lattice at scale. Better: invert to constraint-first synthesis — treat the four sharp lists as simultaneous constraints and solve for the construction. Run everything concurrently.
member_positions.philosopher_of_science: Feasible-set characterization is the program's maturation. Guards: (1) freeze import-typing rules before cross-cell N comparisons (Duhem-Quine lives in the counter); (2) pre-register both endings now — empty intersection falsifies the predeclared space, not GU-the-idea, and a survivor supports existence not unification; (3) the real update-maker is a differing prediction handed to Lane 2 the moment any cell reaches joint R1.

ranked_search_plan.what: One page freezing both interpretive commitments: what the program asserts if the joint intersection empties, and what it asserts if a survivor emerges (existence-with-N-imports, not unification). Include frozen import-typing rules.
ranked_search_plan.why: Vaccine against post-hoc goalpost moves in either direction; also freezes the counter semantics cross-cell comparisons depend on (philosopher, orthodox).

ranked_search_plan.what: GR R0 probe in lemma form, C9 (ambient/H-class) before C3 (bare-theta): stated hypotheses, machine-checked residual arithmetic, predeclared endpoint. Includes the native-vacuum sub-question (is Psi=0 native or comparator-inherited?) as an explicit reframe candidate.
ranked_search_plan.why: GR remains the binding constraint; lemma discipline makes either outcome durable; the vacuum sub-question is the one reframe that could move the whole family (orthodox, heterodox).

ranked_search_plan.what: SM arithmetic sweep built as a reusable harness (candidate quotient/algebra in, anomaly/chirality/generations/hypercharge verdict out) in tests/; run concurrent with P1, not after.
ranked_search_plan.why: Kill-rate compounds; the harness is the seed of scaled generation over the axis lattice (commercial, frontier).

ranked_search_plan.what: Unchanged from round 1; fold into the first completed probe.

PARKED: invert enumerate-and-filter into solving the four sharp constraint lists simultaneously for a construction; also generalize candidate generation over the axis lattice beyond the 9 named families.
ranked_search_plan.why: Boldest move, correctly staged: becomes council round 3's question if P1/P2 leave the map unmoved (frontier).

council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: Adopt P0 immediately (one page, this or next run), then P1 and P2 concurrently — P1 in lemma form C9-first with the native-vacuum reframe sub-question, P2 as a reusable harness. P5 parked as the round-3 agenda if the map does not move. Convergence: binding-constraint logic holds across all five stances; the amendments are about execution discipline (lemma form, pre-registration, concurrency, harness reuse), not direction.

member_positions.differential_geometer: Do not rerun GR until C9 has a source-owned ambient/H-class first variation with coefficient fixed before benchmark use, or until a genuinely source-owned bare-theta vacuum equation appears.
member_positions.statistician: The first SM harness seed failed, but the harness itself is the reusable kill-rate tool for future generated C5 candidates.
member_positions.computer_scientist: P3 should normalize stale map counts and retro grades before scaled candidate generation; P4 should make the QM checklist similarly executable.
member_positions.logician: No exhaustion follows from current failures because gated cells remain and R0_FAIL is scoped to current evidence and frozen constraint lists.
member_positions.philosopher_of_science: The useful update is feasible-set narrowing, not a verdict. Preserve the pre-registered endings and make the next move reduce ambiguity rather than repeat a failed cell.

ranked_search_plan.what: Confirm C1-SM import count, C1-COSMO R0 status, C2-GR inheritance, and coverage arithmetic against the frozen lists; clear stale verification_needed flags where the evidence is sufficient.
ranked_search_plan.why: The map now carries new P1/P2 dispositions, so cleaning retro grades is the highest-leverage integrity move before more probing.

ranked_search_plan.what: Turn the QM physical-sector conditional-fail certificate list into the per-cell R0 checklist and type the C4 adapter gate for a future p2c return.
ranked_search_plan.why: It makes the next sector track executable without weakening the sharp list.

ranked_search_plan.what: After P3/P4, invert the four sharp lists into a candidate-generation problem over the axis lattice, using the P2 harness for SM seeds.
ranked_search_plan.why: The immediate C3/C5 seeds failed and C9 is gated; broader generation is now more useful than another hand probe.

ranked_search_plan.what: Reopen C9 only with a source-owned first variation/coefficient, and rerun C5 only with a source-owned selector packet.

council_rounds.chairman_synthesis: P1 and P2 completed and narrowed the feasible set without triggering exhaustion. Next handoff is P3 retro-verification, then P4 QM checklist; use P5 constraint-first synthesis if those do not produce a cleaner immediate candidate.
